pattern: Filling two cups at once is best whenever two non-empty piles remain, so the answer is governed by whether the largest pile exceeds the other two combined.
hints: Each second you ideally drain two different piles, so think about when you are forced to fill just one cup at a time.
If one pile is bigger than the sum of the other two, those two can always pair against it and the leftover of the big pile is filled one per second.
Otherwise the three counts pair up almost perfectly, giving the ceiling of half their total.

edge_inputs.description: one pile dominates the other two combined
balanced total that is odd forces one solo second
largest equals the sum of the others

stress.description: random triples across the whole value range
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    return [[rng.randint(0, 100), rng.randint(0, 100), rng.randint(0, 100)]]
